name: workflow-plugin-agent
description: AI agent primitives for workflow apps
author: GoCodeAlone

stepSchemas.description: Runs the autonomous agent loop: LLM call → tool execution → repeat until the task is complete or max_iterations is reached.

configFields.label: Provider Service
configFields.description: Name of the AI provider service in the module registry (default: ratchet-ai)

configFields.label: Max Iterations
configFields.description: Maximum number of agent loop iterations before halting

configFields.label: Approval Timeout
configFields.description: How long to wait for human approval before timing out

configFields.label: Request Timeout
configFields.description: Maximum duration for a single agent execution

configFields.label: Loop Detection
configFields.description: Loop detection tuning: max_consecutive, max_errors, max_alternating, max_no_progress

outputs.description: Final text content produced by the agent
Number of agent loop iterations executed
Extended thinking output (present when the model supports it)

stepSchemas.description: Tests connectivity to a registered AI provider by alias, measuring round-trip latency.

configFields.label: Provider Alias
configFields.description: Alias of the provider to test (can be a template expression)

outputs.description: true when the provider responded successfully

stepSchemas.description: Lists available models from an AI provider API, accepting provider credentials from the pipeline context.

outputs.description: Array of model objects: {id, name, context_window}
Error description when success is false

stepSchemas.description: Ensures a local model is available by pulling it from Ollama or downloading from HuggingFace Hub.

configFields.label: Source
configFields.description: Model source: ollama (local server) or huggingface (Hub download)

configFields.label: File
configFields.description: Filename within the HuggingFace repo to download (required for huggingface source)

configFields.label: Output Directory
configFields.description: Local directory to store downloaded files (defaults to ~/.cache/workflow/models)

configFields.label: Ollama Base URL
configFields.description: Ollama server base URL (only used for ollama source)

outputs.description: Result status: ready (already present), downloaded, or error
Local path or name of the model
File size in bytes (0 for Ollama models)
